stage_name: Homepage Schema type evaluation and isolated draft pilot

homepage.title: 公开研究首页
homepage.metadata_description: 元亨利红木家具GEO公开研究案例：225条AI回答、6项核心诊断、5个内容资产与13条公开FAQ。
homepage.h1: 元亨利红木家具 GEO 诊断与可核验内容体系
homepage.schema_description: 本页呈现基于公开资料完成、未受元亨利委托且不代表品牌官方立场的独立 GEO 研究案例，围绕 AI 回答基线、品牌事实治理、内容体系和页面技术优化，诊断认知与证据缺口。
homepage.identity_statement: 本项目为基于公开资料完成的独立 GEO 研究与求职作品集，未受元亨利委托，不代表品牌官方立场；不声称已提升 AI 收录、引用、曝光、推荐或销售。

options.label: WebSite only
options.summary: Safest minimal site-level JSON-LD; it resolves the missing JSON-LD finding with the fewest page-confirmed fields, but does not explicitly model the homepage as a page.

options.label: WebSite + WebPage
options.summary: Best current fit: the homepage is both the site entry point and a concrete WebPage, and the graph can express that relationship without publisher, author, organization, brand, person or search fields.

options.label: WebSite + CollectionPage
options.summary: The homepage links to content assets, but it is also a diagnostic dashboard and project narrative; CollectionPage overstates the collection semantics for the current page.

forbidden_text_fragments: 元亨利官方 GEO 项目
已帮助元亨利提升 AI 引用
